understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle by maneuvering one or more selectable pieces (P or S) onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously, achieving a WIN condition per level and progressing through the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (identified by player.position and id) by 3 pixels per cell in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if unblocked; walls (#) variably block or interact unexpectedly; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates; multiple selectables require positioning all on goals at once to win, with hints from movement.blocked and semantic_grid.
